role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of linguistic cues (no signs) and abstained from assessment.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, soil color, and vegetation patterns consistent with the Anatolian plateau.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed vegetation types (steppe, scrub) and their distribution, staying within botanical scope.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Analyzed infrastructure (transformers, poles, fencing) and road types, which falls under regulatory/infrastructure standards.
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (architecture + infrastructure) to distinguish Turkey from similar regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Turkey by leveraging the specific combination of rural architecture and utility infrastructure. The agents stayed within their domains, and the tournament logic was sound.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of arid hills and red roofs match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of steppe vegetation and scrub match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of the transformer and poles match the image.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Synthesis of visual cues is accurate.
